So the closest I've got to this problem was when I built this system that a customer could show up to, ask the system a question, and the system was supposed to only look at a very bespoke set of corpus documents that are generated by that person to then answer the question.

One is objectively answerable, the other is subjectively.
Recommendation versus what was the last thing I did on X date.
